duplexBoard.name: Duplex Board
duplexBoard.short: Premium grey and white back grades for FMCG, cosmetics, and pharmaceutical packaging
duplexBoard.description: Premium quality duplex board with grey or white back. Ideal for FMCG packaging, cosmetics boxes, pharmaceutical cartons, and electronics packaging. Available in GC1, GC2, and GD2 grades.

testlinerFluting.name: Testliner & Fluting
testlinerFluting.short: Recycled containerboard for corrugated applications with consistent quality and competitive pricing
testlinerFluting.description: Recycled containerboard in grades TL1, TL2, TL3, and Fluting Medium. Perfect for e-commerce packaging, industrial boxes, and agricultural packaging. Sustainable choice with 60-100% recycled content.

kraftlinerWhiteTop.name: Kraftliner & White Top
kraftlinerWhiteTop.short: Virgin fiber linerboard with superior strength and high burst index for demanding applications
kraftlinerWhiteTop.description: Virgin fiber kraftliner and white top linerboard with exceptional strength. High burst index (3.5-5.5 kPa·m²/g) for heavy-duty, export, and premium packaging applications.

triplexBoard.name: TRİPLEXBOARD
triplexBoard.short: High performance multi-ply recycled board for packaging
triplexBoard.description: Premium quality triplex board with white top and grey back. Excellent stiffness and printability for packaging solutions. Ideal for FMCG, food packaging, and industrial cartons. Cost-effective sustainable choice.

paperConesTubes.name: Textile Paper Cones & Yarn Tubes
paperConesTubes.short: Paper cones and tubes for the textile industry – yarn, conical, cheese-winding and dye tubes; natural, dyed, printed and made to size.
paperConesTubes.subline: Paper cones and tubes for textile and winding applications – conical cones, spool, cheese-winding and dye tubes. Natural, dyed, printed and velvet/flocked. Custom sizes and samples available.
paperConesTubes.description: As a supplier and sourcing partner we provide paper cones and tubes for textile and winding applications: yarn paper cones, conical (taper) cones, cheese-winding tubes, paper dye tubes and specialty cones. Available natural, dyed, printed and with a velvet/flocked tip – made to your dimensions with samples on request. Sourced from the EU and Turkey.
paperConesTubes.metaTitle: Textile Paper Cones & Yarn Tubes | Paper Cone Supplier
paperConesTubes.metaDescription: Paper cones & tubes for the textile industry: yarn, conical, cheese-winding & dye tubes. Printed, dyed, custom-made. From the EU & Turkey. Request a quote.

headings.specs: Technical Specifications of the Paper Cones
headings.types: Cone & Tube Types for the Textile Industry
headings.custom: Printed & Custom Cones Made to Size

types.intro: We source the right cone or tube format for your process – from spinning and winding through to yarn dyeing.

konus.name: Conical Cones / Taper Cones
konus.desc: For cheese packages as well as weaving and knitting yarns. The conical shape ensures smooth, even yarn unwinding in downstream processing.

garn.name: Yarn Cones / Tubes
garn.desc: Carriers for spinning and twisting – dimensionally stable for clean, even winding.

kreuzspul.name: Cheese-Winding Tubes
kreuzspul.desc: Designed for automatic winding machines, with consistent dimensions for smooth running.

faerbe.name: Dye Tubes
faerbe.desc: Perforated tubes for yarn dyeing that allow the dye liquor to penetrate evenly. {{TODO: only if we carry dye tubes}}

naehgarn.name: Sewing Thread Cones / Spool Tubes
naehgarn.desc: For sewing thread and technical yarns – available in various lengths and diameters.

spezial.name: Specialty Cones
spezial.desc: Special shapes and custom dimensions to your specification.

comparison.intro: In many textile processes paper cones are the more sustainable and process-safe alternative to plastic cones.

points.recyclable: Fully recyclable and made from a renewable raw material.
points.contaminationFree: Contamination-free – no plastic residue in the fibre cycle.
points.dyeProcess: Suitable for dyeing processes (perforated dye tubes).
points.disposal: Easy, single-stream disposal via the waste-paper cycle.

comparison.sustainabilityBody: Our paper cones are made from recyclable material and can be disposed of as a single stream at the end of their life cycle, helping you reduce plastic in your supply chain.

custom.body: We supply paper cones to your specification: printed with logo, codes or colour rings for yarn identification, dyed or with a velvet/flocked tip. We match dimensions, colours and print to your machines and programme – samples on request.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner in the global paper trade industry.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: At Paper Market World, we strive to bridge the gap between manufacturers and consumers of paper products globally. Our mission is to provide seamless, efficient, and transparent trading solutions that empower businesses to thrive.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be the world's leading digital platform for paper trading, setting the standard for quality, reliability, and innovation in the industry.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Common questions about our services and trading process.

moq.question: What are your minimum order quantities (MOQ)?
moq.answer: Our standard MOQ is one 20ft container (approx. 15-18 tons). However, for new clients, we can discuss trial orders or mixed containers depending on the grade.

payment.question: Which payment terms do you accept?
payment.answer: We typically work with L/C (Letter of Credit) at sight, CAD (Cash Against Documents), or TT (Telegraphic Transfer). Credit terms may be available for long-term partners subject to insurance approval.

logistics.question: Do you handle logistics and customs clearance?
logistics.answer: Yes, we provide end-to-end logistics solutions. We handle shipping, insurance, and all export documentation. Import customs clearance is usually the responsibility of the buyer, but we provide all necessary support and paperwork.

samples.question: Can you provide samples before ordering?
samples.answer: Absolutely. We can send A4 samples via courier for quality verification. For larger trial reels, please contact our sales team.

data.title: Data We Collect
data.body: We collect information you provide directly, including name, email, company details, and inquiry information when you contact us.

use.title: How We Use Data
use.body: Your data is used solely to respond to your inquiries and provide quotes. We do not sell or share your information with third parties.

protection.title: Data Protection
protection.body: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. Contact us at privacy@papermarketworld.com.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.body: We use essential cookies for site functionality. No tracking cookies are used.

liability.title: Liability for content
liability.body: The contents of this website have been prepared with the greatest possible care. However, we assume no liability for the accuracy, completeness or timeliness of the content.

dispute.title: Online dispute resolution
dispute.body: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR): https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr. We are neither obliged nor willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board. Note: sold to business customers (B2B) only.
